item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-v04-p42","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately refuses the next page-level capture-field patch, identifies the repeated downstream field-insertion mechanism across insurance number, return date, transport restriction, and environment requirements, and redirects upstream to a unified loan-record information contract and pre-submit completeness check.
